regime_hint.notes: NIFTY closed 23,412.6 Wed (+0.14%) — a weak bounce after Mon -1.49% / Tue -1.83%. Net 3-day drawdown still ~-3.2%. ATR 1.50%, vol regime LOW. VIX feed null, treating as NORMAL. Scanner top names: SBIN (3.05), SAIL (3.03), TATAPOWER (2.91, gap-down post-Q4 still pricing in). Per-stock Gemini scan: no binary events today across primary watchlist. Hard avoids: SBIN (General Meeting May 15 — banking-cluster leak risk continues, per #lesson 2026-W19), BPCL (trading window closed till May 21, Q4 May 19), TCS (NCW investigation still live, reputational drag), PNB/ETERNAL (outside NIFTY 50, #lesson 2026-05-05), ADANIENT/INDUSINDBK (volatile history). Yesterday's session: 0/4 wins, -Rs 469.55 — three new code lessons (duplicate-entry bug, HIGH_CONVICTION_SCORE bypass leaking 1-strategy entries, SELL ORB on a recovering tape is high-false-positive). Defensive again today.

watchlist.notes: Sole large-cap bank in plan (W19 lesson — at most one bank on SBIN-fallout days). No news per Gemini scan. Watch VWAP — banking-cluster volatility still leaking from SBIN General Meeting May 15.
Down 5+ sessions running into Wed; no event today. Yesterday's SELL ORB at 10:30 stopped out on intraday bounce — 1-strategy short on recovering tape is the high-FP pattern. 2+ confirmations only.
Top-3 scanner score (3.03). No news. Metals — directional with broader market. Yesterday's BUY whipsawed at 09:35 — avoid first-bar entries, wait for confirmed VWAP+ORB confluence.
Q4 was May 12 (clean beat). Wed gap was -6.55% (post-results fade), wide ORB risk per #lesson 2026-05-04. If today's ORB width >2%, skip. Conviction held low for that reason.
Defensive FMCG anchor. No events. Hedge against another whippy IT/metals tape.
Defensive FMCG anchor. No confirmed Q4 date — treat as no event today. Holds 5/20/50-day MAs per prior research.

Cleanest IT name by elimination — TCS (NCW) and INFY (52-wk low) both compromised. Yesterday saw the duplicate-entry bug fire on HCLTECH SELL at 13:30/13:32 — watch the bot for repeat. 2+ confirmation only.

Closed near 52-wk low Wed (Rs 1,123.1). Trading below all key MAs. Tradeable both sides but no high-conviction read; long requires clear VWAP reclaim, short requires 2+ on the downside (yesterday's INFY SELL ORB stopped out).

rationale: RANGING/NORMAL regime with weak Wed bounce (+0.14%) failing to recover the Mon-Tue 3.3% drawdown — the tape is still soft. Watchlist deliberately defensive: 1 bank (HDFCBANK), 2 FMCG anchors (HINDUNILVR, ITC), 1 power (TATAPOWER, post-Q4 fade still pricing), 2 IT (HCLTECH, INFY), 1 metals (SAIL), 1 energy (RELIANCE). All 'both' bias per W19 — directional bias has misfired 3/4 weeks and bias-invalidation conditions are still not executed in code (#lesson 2026-05-08, 3rd recurrence). Hard avoids: SBIN (General Meeting May 15), BPCL (trading window closed), TCS (NCW investigation), PNB/ETERNAL (outside NIFTY 50), ADANIENT/INDUSINDBK (volatile, prior SL clusters). Risk overrides tightened to max_trades=3, risk=1.0%, max_open=2 — fresh -Rs 469.55 drawdown yesterday + weak bounce + Fed-hawkish overhang argue for defensive sizing again today. 2+ confirmation rule is the load-bearing filter; HIGH_CONVICTION_SCORE bypass at 60 is still in code and leaked 1-strategy entries yesterday — manual eye on signal logs during the morning.
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): Default to bias: both unless catalyst is robust to intraday price action
#lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): On big-bank-print days keep at most one bank in watchlist with both bias (SBIN GM May 15 — only HDFCBANK kept)
#lesson 2026-05-13: SELL ORB signals on a recovering tape are high-FP — require 2+ confirmations for any SELL entry if NIFTY is +0.3%+ by 10:00
#lesson 2026-05-13: HIGH_CONVICTION_SCORE bypass at 60 leaked 1-strategy entries on every session since May 11 — relying on manual oversight until bypass is raised/removed
#lesson 2026-05-13: Duplicate-entry bug on HCLTECH (13:30 + 13:32 identical signal) — flagged HCLTECH in notes to watch for repeat
#lesson 2026-05-08: Daily plan bias invalidation not auto-applied in code — using bias=both everywhere
#lesson 2026-05-05: PNB/ETERNAL outside NIFTY 50 — excluded from watchlist
#lesson 2026-05-04: Wide ORB (>2%) post-earnings stocks gap through stops — TATAPOWER excluded if morning ORB >2%
#lesson 2026-04-30: ADANIENT binary event block — extended to all stocks with active trading window restrictions (BPCL until May 21)
